Think about what the last unmatched open bracket is at any point — that tells you what the next closing bracket must be.
A Stack is perfect here: push open brackets onto the stack. When you see a close bracket, check if it matches the top of the stack.
Use a map to relate closing → opening: `')' → '('`, `']' → '['`, `'}' → '{'`. On a close bracket, pop and compare.
At the end, the stack must be empty — any remaining open brackets mean they were never closed.
